description: Letter in Arabic script. Fragment (upper part). Dating: Ottoman-era. Addressed to Sulaymān Maymūn al-Qazzāz(?). Asking him to purchase the headdress (kūfiyya) they had previously spoken about when the addressee was going to Cairo. Goes on to mention various other business matters and people such as Ibn al-Janānī. Reused for accounts in Hebrew script and Hebrew numerals.
